Name: FDockTabStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SDockTab

Variables.Name: CloseButtonStyle
Variables.Description: Style used for the close button

Variables.Name: NormalBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when this tab is in its normal state

Variables.Name: ActiveBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when this tab is in its active state

Variables.Name: ColorOverlayTabBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to overlay a given color onto this tab

Variables.Name: ColorOverlayIconBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to overlay a given color onto this tab

Variables.Name: ForegroundBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when this tab is in the foreground

Variables.Name: HoveredBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when this tab is hovered over

Variables.Name: ContentAreaBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used by the SDockingTabStack to draw the content associated with this tab; Documents, Apps, and Tool Panels have different backgrounds

Variables.Name: TabWellBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used by the SDockingTabStack to draw the content associated with this tab; Documents, Apps, and Tool Panels have different backgrounds

Variables.Name: OverlapWidth
Variables.Description: The width that this tab will overlap with side-by-side tabs

Variables.Name: FlashColor
Variables.Description: Color used when flashing this tab
